# Spirit Real Estate — Zichron Yaakov, Israel

> Boutique real estate firm based in Zichron Yaakov, Israel.
> We specialize in helping foreign buyers, Olim, and Israelis returning
> home navigate the Zichron Yaakov property market with personal,
> hands-on guidance from search to closing.

Languages: English, Hebrew (עברית)
Contact: WhatsApp +972-52-282-0632 · Email spiritisraelhomes@gmail.com
Office: HaChochit 15, Zichron Yaakov 3091668, Israel
Website: https://spirit666.lovable.app
Sitemap: https://spirit666.lovable.app/sitemap.xml

## Core pages

- [Home (EN)](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/): Boutique real estate in Zichron Yaakov.
- [Home (HE)](https://spirit666.lovable.app/he/): נדל"ן בוטיק בזכרון יעקב.
- [Available Properties](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/properties): Current homes for sale in Zichron Yaakov.
- [Homes for Sale Guide](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/homes-for-sale-zichron-yaakov): Overview of the local market.
- [Buying Property in Zichron Yaakov](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/buying-property-zichron-yaakov): Step-by-step buyer guidance.
- [Living in Zichron Yaakov](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/living-in-zichron-yaakov): Lifestyle, neighborhoods, amenities.
- [Moving to Zichron Yaakov](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/moving-to-zichron-yaakov): Relocation guide for Olim and foreign buyers.
- [Selling Your Home](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/sell): Listing and marketing services.
- [About](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/about): Team and approach.
- [Contact](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/contact): Reach the team.

## Guides & Insights

- [Guides Hub](https://spirit666.lovable.app/en/guides): Articles on buying, taxes, neighborhoods, and the Olim experience.
